creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #10)

I don't understand at all what's going on here. Running Nextcloud jailed wth php-fpm PHP 8.0 using LDAP to connect to OpenLDAP 2.4 server over ldaps/636 works fine for me.

Please report upstream as well if you haven't already. Register the upstream issue in the URL of this PR.

You seem to have some misbehaving Apps as well? apporder, files_antivirus. Try disabling all apps not provided by the www/nextcloud package?
